allow:
Bash(python scripts/check-skill-quality.py --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Sort by score ascending
skills = sorted\(data['results'], key=lambda x: x['score']\)
for s in skills:
    if s['grade'] in \('D', 'F'\):
        print\(f\\"{s['grade']} {s['score']:3d} {s['skill']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"\\\\nTotal D/F: {sum\(1 for s in skills if s['grade'] in \('D','F'\)\)}\\"\)")

hooks.command: if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/stop.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/stop.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/stop.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/stop.sh"; fi

if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh"; fi

if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/session-start-compact.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/session-start-compact.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-start-compact.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-start-compact.sh"; fi

if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/pre-compact.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/pre-compact.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/pre-compact.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/pre-compact.sh"; fi

if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh"; fi

if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use.sh"; fi

if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use-failure.sh" ]; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use-failure.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use-failure.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use-failure.sh"; fi
